title: polypodium eurybasis var. glabrescens
intro: Polypodium eurybasis var. glabrescens, also known as the Mountain Rock Fern, is a variety of plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family, specifically a type of fern native to New Zealand. The Mountain Rock Fern has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include treating various skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as having potential antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the Mountain Rock Fern is typically used as an infusion or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic properties.
